scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run db:generate && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.start: npm --prefix server run migrate:deploy && node server/dist/index.js
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.db:setup: npm --prefix server run db:migrate && npm --prefix server run db:generate
